topic: switching from Windows to Linux as a developer
hook: Choose: switching from Windows to Linux as a developer.

script_segments.text: Choose: switching from Windows to Linux as a developer.
script_segments.visual_direction: Split screen. Two options. Text: 'PICK ONE'.

script_segments.text: Left: the old way of doing switching from Windows to Linux as a developer. Slow. Painful. Right: the new way. Clean. Fast. Choose wisely.
script_segments.visual_direction: Quick pros of each side flash as text. Point left, then right.

script_segments.text: If you're still on the left... we need to talk. Comment your pick.
script_segments.visual_direction: Point to your pick. Wink or nod. Text: 'Comment yours'. Loop-friendly.

caption: Talking about switching from Windows to Linux as a developer because someone needed to say it. Agree or disagree?
sound_suggestion: game show buzzer / choice sound effect
